compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add replan cycle bound check in preplanning SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Add cycle bound check against sprint.max_replan_cycles before emitting REPLAN_ESCALATE from escalate_to_epic handling.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] preplanning SKILL.md references max_replan_cycles near REPLAN_ESCALATE
  Verify: grep -q 'max_replan_cycles' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] test-escalate-orchestrator.sh passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-escalate-orchestrator.sh
